column9: Rule:If a court order exists (T1049) and the NCP/PF is unidentified (MCI number is 999995 and the member status in VCMEM is active) do NOT convert a SORD and OBLE.
Rule:If t1049.create_dt = high date, move T1049.court_dt.

Rule:If VCASE.StatusCase_CODE = C (closed) and the VSORD.OrderEnd_DATE > conversion date
move VCASE.StatusCurrent_DATE.
If VCASE.StatusCase_CODE = O (open) and the VSORD.OrderEnd_DATE > conversion date, move high date.
If VCASE.StatusCase_CODE = O (open) and the VSORD.OrderEnd_DATE < or =  conversion date and arrears exist,
Move high date

Rule:If T1044.wage_suppress_ind = Y move S
else move I.  
If T1044.ivd_typ_cd = DIRP default to N.
LOV Income Withhold Order - REFM SORD/IWOR

Rule:If the T1049.originating_st_cd is a valid state, move A (active)
else move U (unknown).

Rule:If the state is valid, move the state fips code and move zeroes to the last 5 bytes.
If the state is not valid default to Delaware (1000000) and move U (unknown) to CejStatus_CODE.
Rule:Fetch the state fips using VFIPS and zero fill last 5 bytes.

Rule:Where T1044.ivd_typ_cd = DIRP or T1049.ins_ordered_ind = N   default to N
else follow crosswalk rule.

Rule:If case is NON IVD - move high dates 
ELSE
For court orders with current charging obligations (CS and MS):
add 3 years to T1049.court_date until this calculated date is 6 months or more from conversion date, then subtract 6 months from this date.
ELSE
move high dates.
VSORD Direct Pay Indicator lookup table
